title: Tides
content:
Love in my heart was a fresh tide flowing
Where the star-like sea gulls soar;
The sun was keen and the foam was blowing
High on the rocky shore.

But now in the dusk the tide is turning,
Lower the sea gulls soar,
And the waves that rose in resistless yearning
Are broken forevermore.
meaning:
Sara Teasdale's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Tides"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
